sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Dacey Reservoir: Season: Open year around except the upper portions of Dacey Reservoir closed to trespass February 15 through August 15 as posted. A 100-yard area as posted around the inflow from Hot Creek to Dacey Reservoir is closed to fishing January 1 through April 1. Limits — Daily: 1 trout, and 15 warmwater game fish of which not more than 10 may be black bass. No limit on bullheads (unlimited possession). Limit is zero black bass (catch and release only) from April 1 through June 30. Possession: 2 trout and 30 warmwater game fish of which not more than 20 may be black bass. Hours: Any hour of the day or night.

sources.title: Dacey Reservoir at Kirch WMA — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: Dacey Reservoir is located on the Kirch Wildlife Management Area (formerly Sunnyside), and was constructed in the early 1960s primarily as a water storage area for regulating Dacey Marsh downstream. Stocked rainbow trout are active year around... Largemouth bass fishing is slow until water temperatures reach 60°F, which occurs about mid-May and continues through October.

sources.title: Dacey Reservoir at Kirch WMA — Nevada Department of Wildlife (Stocking Updates)
sources.quotedText: Stocking Updates: 5321 Rainbow Trout, 8.8 in, 06-04-2026; 5593 Rainbow Trout, 9.1 in, 11-20-2025; 1645 Rainbow Trout, 9.1 in, 11-19-2025; 5076 Rainbow Trout, 9.6 in, 04-30-2025; 6282 Rainbow Trout, 8.9 in, 11-13-2024; 7020 Rainbow Trout, 8.6 in, 10-23-2024.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

parameters.note: Open year-round except the upper portions of Dacey Reservoir are closed to trespass February 15 through August 15 as posted (waterfowl nesting protection).

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Nye County, Dacey Reservoir
regulations.humanSummary: Dacey Reservoir is open to fishing year-round, except the upper portions are closed to trespass February 15 through August 15 as posted.
regulations.verbatimText: Season: Open year around except the upper portions of Dacey Reservoir closed to trespass February 15 through August 15 as posted.

parameters.note: A 100-yard area, as posted, around the inflow from Hot Creek to Dacey Reservoir is closed to fishing January 1 through April 1.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Nye County, Dacey Reservoir
regulations.humanSummary: A 100-yard area (as posted) around the inflow of Hot Creek into Dacey Reservoir is closed to fishing January 1 through April 1.
regulations.verbatimText: A 100-yard area as posted around the inflow from Hot Creek to Dacey Reservoir is closed to fishing January 1 through April 1.

parameters.counting_rule: Daily limit is 1 trout plus 15 warmwater game fish, of which not more than 10 may be black bass — but black bass are catch-and-release only (zero-fish limit) April 1 through June 30. No limit on bullheads (unlimited possession). Possession limit is 2 trout plus 30 warmwater game fish, of which not more than 20 may be black bass.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Nye County, Dacey Reservoir
regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit: 1 trout and 15 warmwater game fish (no more than 10 black bass, zero black bass/catch-and-release April 1–June 30); bullheads unlimited. Possession limit: 2 trout and 30 warmwater game fish (no more than 20 black bass).
regulations.verbatimText: Limits — Daily: 1 trout, and 15 warmwater game fish of which not more than 10 may be black bass. No limit on bullheads (unlimited possession). Limit is zero black bass (catch and release only) from April 1 through June 30. Possession: 2 trout and 30 warmwater game fish of which not more than 20 may be black bass.

parameters.counting_rule: From April 1 through June 30, black bass at Dacey Reservoir must be released immediately; zero may be kept (daily or possession).

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Nye County, Dacey Reservoir
regulations.humanSummary: Black bass are catch-and-release only at Dacey Reservoir from April 1 through June 30 (zero-fish limit).
regulations.verbatimText: Limit is zero black bass (catch and release only) from April 1 through June 30.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Nye County, Dacey Reservoir
regulations.humanSummary: Fishing is allowed any hour of the day or night.
regulations.verbatimText: Hours: Any hour of the day or night.

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
